auth.forgotPasswordHint: Enter your email and we'll send reset instructions.
auth.accessDeniedBody: This dashboard is for vendor applicants and approved service providers only.
auth.mainHandoffHint: You were redirected from MyTicket. Sign in with the same account to continue your vendor application or dashboard.
auth.oauthMissingCode: Missing authorization code from the provider. Please try signing in again.
auth.oauthVerifying: Verifying your authorization with the provider.
auth.oauthTryAgain: Please try again or use email and password.

application.status_provisioning: Your profile is being set up…
application.categoriesNote: Select the services you offer. At least one category is required.
application.document_required: At least one verification document is required.
application.gallery_required: Add photos of your past work or equipment.
application.incomplete: Please complete all required fields before submitting.
application.categoriesRequired: Select at least one service category to continue.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.serviceCategoriesHint: Badges shown on your public profile. Pick presets or create your own.

categories.emptySelectionHint: Choose from the list below or create a custom badge.
categories.createCustomHint: Can't find your niche? Add a label that describes what you offer.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Showcase your work with a profile image and photo gallery.
portfolio.profileImageHint: This appears on your public vendor profile in the marketplace.
portfolio.galleryHint: Add photos of past events, setups, or equipment.
portfolio.addPhotoHint: Optional caption helps organizers understand what each photo shows.
portfolio.emptyGalleryHint: Upload your first photo to showcase your work on your public profile.
portfolio.galleryManageHint: Reorder photos, edit captions, or remove images. Changes to order and captions are saved together.
portfolio.saveGalleryHint: Reorder and caption edits are not live until you save.

availability.title: Availability
availability.availableHint: Organizers can discover and contact you in the marketplace.
availability.reservedHint: You appear as booked. Switch back when you're open to new requests.
availability.engagementHint: Accepting an engagement automatically sets your status to reserved. Completing or cancelling returns you to available.

ratings.title: Ratings
ratings.empty: Complete engagements to receive ratings from organizers.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage language, notifications, and account preferences.
settings.notificationsHint: Control how you receive updates about engagements and your account.
settings.accountHint: Update your personal account details used across MyTicket.
settings.changeEmailHint: A verification link will be sent to your new email address.
settings.emailChangeSent: Check your new email inbox to confirm the change.

governmentId.pageSubtitle: Verify your identity for marketplace trust and compliance.
governmentId.title: Government ID verification
governmentId.hint: Upload your official ID so admins can verify your identity.
governmentId.pendingHint: Your documents are under review. This page refreshes automatically.
governmentId.verifiedHint: Your government ID has been verified.
governmentId.loadError: Could not load government ID status. You can still submit documents below.

errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in a moment.
errors.timeout: The server took too long to respond.
errors.oauthNoRedirect: Provider did not return a redirect URL.
errors.oauthStateMismatch: OAuth state mismatch. Try signing in again.
errors.oauthIncomplete: We could not finish signing you in.
errors.vendorOnly: This dashboard is for vendor accounts only.

upload.noUrl: Upload response did not include a URL.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.bioMin: Bio must be at least {{min}} characters.
validation.documentKindInvalid: Kind must be url or document.
validation.attachmentUrlInvalid: Attachment must be a valid URL.
validation.patchProfileName: Use business_name on PATCH, not profile_name.
